# Regex fixtures for skill: outcome-review
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH lines pin the LEARN-phase boundary: "how did" without outcome verbs,
# pre-experiment prose, and separated post/launch must not fire.

MATCH: how did the experiment perform last week
MATCH: what was the adoption of the new flag
MATCH: review the cohort retention numbers
MATCH: measure the impact of the cache change
MATCH: did it work after the rollout

NO_MATCH: how did you implement the parser
NO_MATCH: post the launch announcement to slack
NO_MATCH: review the experiment setup before we run it
NO_MATCH: investigate the production outage from last night
